summary: Frontend testing of Feed component reactions, PostModal, and CreatePostModal. All features working correctly. Could NOT reproduce the reported bug about 'name and emoji count appearing underneath posts after long-press reaction'.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or be misconfigured (non-blocking)

action_items: User reported bug could not be reproduced - may need more specific reproduction steps from user
Consider asking user for: browser type, device type (mobile/desktop), specific post ID where bug occurs
critical_code_review_comments: ReactionIcon component (PostCard.js lines 354-398) correctly renders ONLY the emoji or Shaka icon - no user_name or count
Post actions area (PostCard.js lines 607-668) displays like count NEXT TO the reaction icon (Instagram-style), not underneath
ReactionPicker component (Feed.js lines 113-154) renders only emoji buttons with no extra text
handleReaction function stores user_name in reactions array but ReactionIcon only uses emoji field
PostModal (PostModal.js) working correctly - Instagram-style popup with image on left, details on right
CreatePostModal (CreatePostModal.js) supports multi-photo carousel upload (up to 10 photos) - confirmed working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user and posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested reaction functionality (tap for Shaka, long-press for emoji picker), PostModal popup, and CreatePostModal multi-photo upload. All features working correctly. User-reported bug about 'name and emoji count appearing underneath posts' could NOT be reproduced. The ReactionIcon component only renders the emoji, and the like count is displayed next to it (not underneath). If user reports this again, need more specific reproduction steps.

reaction_tap_for_shaka.notes: Quick tap toggles Shaka like state correctly

reaction_long_press_picker.notes: Long press (500ms+) opens reaction picker with 🤙, 🌊, ❤️, 🔥 emojis

reaction_icon_display.notes: Selected emoji displays correctly in place of Shaka icon. NO extra user_name or count underneath.

like_count_display.notes: Like count displays NEXT TO the reaction icon (Instagram-style), not underneath

post_modal_popup.notes: Clicking post image opens Instagram-style modal with image on left, details/comments on right

create_post_modal.notes: Modal shows Photos (up to 10), Video, Camera buttons. Multi-photo carousel confirmed.

multi_photo_carousel.notes: CreatePostModal shows 'Select up to 10 photos for a carousel post' text. File upload not tested (requires actual files).

bug_investigation.reported_bug: name and emoji count are still appearing underneath the post, only on emojis that come up when you have to hold down the mouse to activate them
code_review_findings: ReactionIcon component only renders emoji span or Shaka img - no user_name or count
Post actions area has like count in same flex row as reaction icon (gap-1.5), not underneath
No conditional rendering that would add extra elements after long-press reaction selection
possible_explanations: Bug may have been fixed in a previous iteration
User may be seeing the caption area (which shows author_name) and confusing it with reaction display
